corrective_rules: Do not treat demos as orders or revenue.
Require paid adoption or financial translation before S5.
Do not classify research reports or demonstrations as hard reality evidence.
Require customer, revenue, or product delivery evidence before S6.
Do not upgrade from S4 to S5 without valuation reframing and financial translation.
Treat consumer friction as confidence-reducing missing data until validated.
Policy naming alone cannot move a topic above S3.
Require leader, breadth, volume, and persistence before S4.
Price action alone is not pricing adoption.
Require customer, revenue, utility, or regulatory evidence before S6.
